description_long: This is a whimsical stuffed toy resembling a gnome, featuring a tall, pointed hat with alternating light gray and white horizontal stripes. The toy has a round, soft body covered in gray fabric, with two stubby arms and two large, white feet protruding from its base. Its face is mostly obscured by a long, bushy gray beard, with only a round, pale nose visible beneath the brim of the hat. The hat is oversized and droops slightly, adding to the playful character of the toy. The overall appearance is soft and plush, with a cozy, hand-crafted aesthetic. The toy is designed to be endearing and decorative, suitable for display in urban environments such as shop windows, parks, or neighborhood porches.
description: A plush gnome stuffed toy with a striped pointed hat, long gray beard, and round nose, featuring soft gray and white fabrics. Its whimsical design and cozy appearance make it a charming decorative figure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gnome's striped hat, round nose, long gray beard, and both arms and feet clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length and droop of the hat, the profile of the nose, and one arm and foot more prominently.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the striped hat and the rounded gray body, with arms extending outward.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the hat's curve, the side of the beard, and both feet with one arm partially visible.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: gnome with a striped hat and long beard
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with only a round, pale nose visible beneath the hat and no discernible eyes or mouth.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and feet extended forward.
